title: Addis Plastic Butler Large Rectangular Bowl, Soft Black, 12.5 Litre ,505607
features: 12.5L capacity - ideal for large amounts of dishes
Can hold plates up to 10" wide
Easy to clean - simply wipe with a damp cloth
Addis - part of the home since 1780
Perfect for all of your washing up needs - comes in a range of colours
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. BPA Free Made from totally BPA Free plastic. 12L Capacity This convenient plastic bowl can hold up to 12 litres of water which is perfect for all of your washing up needs. Dimensions W41.81cm X D32cm X H16.99cm
